title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: A YouTube video examining whether Google engineers use AI-assisted code generation tools. The content compares OpenAI Codex and Claude Code capabilities and surveys the adoption of "vibe coding" practices at Google across 2024-2026.
